alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations and executing transformation programs with proven ability to design and structure complex initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Strategic and structured, able to turn broad goals into clear strategy, priorities and operating rhythm

alignments.candidate_evidence: Demonstrated ownership and hands-on execution across requirements design, UAT, rollout and transformation rather than delegating; comfortable operating without standard templates
alignments.job_requirement: Hands-on, low-ego and creative, happy to do the work yourself and design compelling value propositions with limited playbooks

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program experience requires metrics-driven decision making and iterative optimization, typical of operations and strategy work
alignments.job_requirement: Data-driven and resilient, using metrics to prioritise and iterate

gaps.gap: Core gap in partnerships, ecosystem and business development domain: Candidate has strategy and operations background, not partnerships management, VC/startup ecosystem strategy, or partner-sourced revenue model execution
gaps.mitigation: Would require significant domain ramp on partnership contracting, VC ecosystem dynamics, and ecosystem-to-pipeline conversion mechanics; achievable over 6–9 months but not immediate contributor

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience building or scaling partner programmes end-to-end or driving partner-sourced commercial revenue; role explicitly requires 3+ years directly in partnerships/ecosystem
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's transformation and operations background does not transfer directly to partnership sourcing, contracting, activation and partner success; would need to learn fintech partner dynamics from scratch

gaps.gap: No evidence of France VC/startup ecosystem network or track record leveraging it; role requires existing network with VCs, accelerators and startup communities in France
gaps.mitigation: Network building in France would require time; candidate's Google experience is global, not France-specific

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience or fluency in fintech, payments, FX or multi-currency products; role explicitly requires strong interest and ability to understand startup use cases in these domains
gaps.mitigation: Candidate can learn payments domain, but role needs someone who already has relevant fintech or payments product knowledge to be credible with VCs and accelerators on day one

output.summary: Candidate is a strong Strategy and Operations leader with 8 years at Google and demonstrated capability to design strategy and execute complex programs at scale. However, this is fundamentally a partnerships and business-development role requiring 3+ years directly in partnership management, existing France VC/startup ecosystem network, end-to-end partner programme execution, and fintech/payments domain fluency. Candidate's background in transformation and operations does not provide the required partnerships, ecosystem or business-development experience; the domain and motion mismatch is too significant despite seniority fit.
uncertainties: Unclear whether candidate has any exposure to partnership models, VC relationships or accelerator programmes during Google tenure
No information on candidate's location or visa status relative to Paris role requirement
Profile does not indicate whether candidate has worked on customer acquisition through ecosystem or channel partnerships in any capacity
